# DM1 external dungeon mapper references

These links are community references for route and coordinate hypotheses only. They are not parity proof and must not be used as authoritative evidence without verification against original DM assets, ReDMCSB source, and/or runtime debugger traces.

## OldGames / DJ's Dungeon Mapper

- Level/map URL: https://www.oldgames.sk/sk/dungeon-mapper/map/1685
  - Status: fetched on 2026-05-06; page identifies `Level 01 - The Hall of Champions`.
  - Extracted champion/route notes from page text:
    - `[14,17]` — `VI Altar of Rebirth`, `New Lives for Old Bones`
    - `[15,15]` — likely hall exit/adjacent route marker
    - `[14,15]` — `Invoke FUL for Magic Torch`
    - `[10,4]` — `Hall of Shampions` inscription
    - Champion mirror coordinates include Azizi `[11,17]`, Gothmog `[2,16]`, Stamm `[7,16]`, Hissssa `[2,15]`, Mophus `[4,14]`, Leif `[10,14]`, Wu Tse `[11,14]`, Wuuf `[7,13]`, Tiggy `[8,13]`, Darouu `[13,13]`, Leyla `[5,11]`, Gando `[7,11]`, Nabi `[1,10]`, Syra `[9,10]`, Linflas `[6,8]`, Halk `[11,8]`, Alex `[2,7]`, Boris `[4,7]`, Elija `[10,7]`, Zed `[8,6]`, Hawk `[2,4]`, Iaido `[8,3]`, Chani `[4,2]`.
  - Use: candidate champion-selection and Hall-of-Champions route hypotheses only.

- Level/map URL: https://www.oldgames.sk/sk/dungeon-mapper/map/1686
  - Status: fetched on 2026-05-06; page identifies `Level 02`, `34 x 34`.
  - Extracted notes/coordinates from page text:
    - `[30,30]` — `Step inside take a ride.`
    - `[23,24]` — `This Wall says nothing`
    - `[20,21]` — `VI` into flask / `VI BRO` into flask serum notes
    - `[14,16]` — close pit by leaving a valuable on floor
    - `[19,6]` — fountain accepts one wish
    - `[29,5]` — `None shall pass`
    - `[3,1]` — `DES VEN` poison spell note
  - Use: candidate movement/viewport route waypoints for debugger probe planning only.

## Verification rule

Do not claim `verified_runtime_hit`, map parity, or coordinate parity from these references alone. Any route derived from these maps must be rechecked with original-game data and runtime traces.
